summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Spanish real estate website 'Propiedades Turísticas RD'. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly. Navigation, search, property details, contact forms, and WhatsApp integration all functional.
passed_tests: Agency settings API (200 OK) - returns correct company info
Properties API with pagination (200 OK) - 6 properties loaded
Featured properties API (200 OK) - 5 featured properties
Individual property API (200 OK) - detailed property data
Contact message API (200 OK) - form submissions working
Seed data API (200 OK) - sample properties created
Homepage loads with hero section and search bar
Navigation menu works - all 4 pages (Inicio, Propiedades, Sobre Nosotros, Contacto)
Search functionality with location filters (Punta Cana filter tested)
Property cards display with 'Ver más' buttons
Property detail pages with image gallery and amenities
Contact form on property detail page submits successfully
Contact form on contact page submits successfully
WhatsApp floating button with correct phone number (+18098475498)
WhatsApp buttons on property pages working
Footer social media links (Facebook, Instagram, TikTok) present
Responsive design and Spanish language content
